name: cold-outreach-system
description: Cold outreach system that designs ICP-targeted, personalized email sequences and LinkedIn outreach campaigns. Supports two modes: content-only (generates copy for manual sending) and Gmail-integrated (creates drafts and sends via Gmail MCP). Produces ICP definitions, multi-touch email sequences, personalization frameworks, follow-up cadences, LinkedIn messages, objection handling scripts, and deliverability setup guides.
